coworkScheduledTasksEnabled.title: Cowork Scheduled Tasks
coworkScheduledTasksEnabled.description: Enable Cowork to run scheduled automation tasks. When enabled, Claude Cowork can execute tasks on a schedule in the background.

ccdScheduledTasksEnabled.title: CCD Scheduled Tasks
ccdScheduledTasksEnabled.description: Enable Claude Code Desktop to run scheduled tasks. When enabled, automated tasks can be triggered on a schedule.

sidebarMode.title: Sidebar Mode
sidebarMode.description: Controls how the sidebar panel is displayed. Possible values depend on the Claude Desktop version; leave unset to use the default layout.

dockBounceEnabled.title: Dock Bounce
dockBounceEnabled.description: When enabled, the app dock icon bounces to notify you of new messages or completed tasks (macOS only).

coworkWebSearchEnabled.title: Cowork Web Search
coworkWebSearchEnabled.description: Allow Claude Cowork to perform web searches when answering questions or completing tasks.

keepAwakeEnabled.title: Keep Awake
keepAwakeEnabled.description: Prevent the system from sleeping while Claude Desktop is active. Useful for long-running tasks that should not be interrupted by sleep.
